description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish Docs that triggers on page build for the gh-pages branch, excluding the docs directory, and when the update-doxygen workflow completes. Use a single ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.8, checks out the gh-pages branch, installs dependencies from requirements.txt, generates HTML documentation with make html, and pushes changes to the gh-pages branch if updates are detected.
